message: Scheduled JWT secret rotation job starting. job_id=jwt-rotate-20240122
Fetching new secret from Vault. path=secret/jwt/signing-key
Vault connection timeout after 2000ms. Retrying 1/3. vault_addr=https://vault.internal:8200
Vault connection timeout after 2000ms. Retrying 2/3.
Vault connection timeout after 2000ms. Retrying 3/3.
Vault unreachable. Rotation job continuing with fallback: will rotate key in-memory only. WARNING: this will not persist.
JWT signing key rotated in-memory. Broadcasting new public key to all auth-service instances via Redis pub/sub.
Failed to receive new public key from pub/sub. Redis cluster unavailable? Keeping existing key.
Failed to receive new public key from pub/sub. Redis cluster unavailable? Keeping existing key.
JWT verification failed: signature invalid. user_id=usr_441291. Returning 401.
JWT verification failed: signature invalid. user_id=usr_552102. Returning 401.
JWT verification failed: signature invalid. user_id=usr_118843. Returning 401.
ALERT FIRING: AuthService401RateCritical - 100% of authenticated requests returning 401. Severity=P1. Paging all on-call.
On-call SRE joined incident channel. Acknowledging P1.
Hypothesis: JWT key rotation failed. Checking Vault connectivity from auth pods.
Vault audit: network policy change at 08:58:00Z blocked egress from auth-service namespace to vault port 8200. Change by: terraform-apply job #4421
Network policy reverted. Vault accessible from auth-service namespace.
Re-running JWT rotation job with Vault connectivity restored.
New JWT key written to Vault and distributed to all instances. Verifying.
401 rate dropping. Currently 40% and falling as clients re-authenticate with new tokens.
ALERT RESOLVED: AuthService401RateCritical. All instances healthy. INC-003 resolved. Duration=47min
